scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.package: npm run build && node -e 'const fs = require("fs"); const v = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("manifest.json")).version; const exec = require("child_process").execSync; exec("npx web-ext build --source-dir dist/chrome --artifacts-dir ../ --overwrite-dest --filename apogee-" + v + "-chrome.zip", {stdio: "inherit"}); exec("npx web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir ../ --overwrite-dest --filename apogee-" + v + "-mozilla.xpi", {stdio: "inherit"});'
